About the 21FC World Cup

The 21FC World Cup is an 8-week tournament league for 21FC members only. 6 captains draft squads of 7, each representing a country. Same teams, same rosters for the entire season. Each team plays every other team twice — then top 4 advance to knockout playoffs. The winning team takes home the 🏆 trophy + $500 cash prize.

Lace Up. Show Up.

What Players Say

Best runs in Jersey. Competition is unmatched — everyone brings energy every Monday morning.

21FC is different. Organized, competitive, and the community is legit.

— Season 1 Player

Having a team that counts on you changes everything. This is real football.

— Team Captain

Format
⏰ 7:10 AM — Kickoff
Gates open 7AM. First whistle at 7:10 sharp.
⚽ 3 Fields — 6 Teams
Simultaneous matches. Every team plays 2 games per Monday.
📊 35-Min Running Clock
3-minute transitions. Done by 8:25 AM.
🏆 League → Playoffs → Final
6 weeks league stage, top 4 knockout rounds. Trophy + $500.

How It Works
1

Register on OpenSports

opensports.net/21fc · $90 entry (6 weeks guaranteed) · 21FC members only.

2

Get Drafted

6 captains draft squads of 7. Players tiered by skill. You get a country.

3

Same Teams, 8 Weeks

Roster locked. Play 6/8 weeks minimum. Your squad counts on you.

4

Win $500 + Trophy

League → playoffs → final. Champions crowned.
